_comment: Binder catalogue for recommendations + the /binders page. To add a binder (any brand or retailer): append an entry to "binders" and, if it's a new shop, add a retailer. Affiliate codes are read from env vars named in each retailer's affiliateEnv — no code changes needed to update links or prices.

binders.name: Vault X 4-Pocket Exo-Tec Zip Binder
binders.blurb: Zip-around, water-resistant shell. 20 double-sided pages hold 160 cards in 4-pocket layout — ideal for chunky jumbo or top-loader-free display.

binders.name: Vault X 4-Pocket Strap Binder
binders.blurb: Elastic-strap closure, padded cover. The budget-friendly way to hold 160 cards in 4-pocket pages.

binders.name: Vault X 9-Pocket Exo-Tec Zip Binder
binders.blurb: The collector default. Zip-around protection, 20 side-loading double-sided pages — 360 cards in the classic 9-pocket grid.

binders.name: Vault X 9-Pocket Strap Binder
binders.blurb: The everyday 9-pocket: elastic strap, side-loading pages, 360-card capacity at a friendlier price than the zip line.

binders.name: Vault X 12-Pocket Exo-Tec Zip Binder
binders.blurb: Denser display: 12 pockets a page, 480 cards total, behind the same zip-around Exo-Tec shell. Great for fitting a master set in one book.

binders.name: Vault X 12-Pocket Strap Binder
binders.blurb: 12 pockets per page with a strap closure — 480 cards, the value pick for larger sets.

binders.name: Vault X 16-Pocket Exo-Tec Zip Binder
binders.blurb: Maximum density: 16 pockets a page, 640 cards. The big book for whole-generation Pokédex runs in one zip-around binder.
